message:
Running command: # All fixes confirmed. Now launch the PnR flow as nohup background process.
# Use a new run tag to get a clean run, with all fixes pre-applied
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

# Launch librelane with new run tag for clean start
nohup librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v2 \
    config.json \
    > /tmp/pnr_v2.log 2>&1 &

PNR_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane PID: $PNR_PID"
echo $PNR_PID > /tmp/pnr_v2.pid
sleep 5
# Check it's running
ps -p $PNR_PID -o pid,pcpu,pmem,etime,cmd --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process check..."
tail -5 /tmp/pnr_v2.log
